---
name: Beta Feedback
about: Share feedback or report an issue with the public beta
title: "[beta] "
labels: beta
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the issue, surprise, or rough edge you ran into. For a
crash or broken behavior, include steps to reproduce and what you expected.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11]
- App version: [e.g., 0.1.0-beta.1]
- ESO install type: [Steam / native client]
- ESO server: [NA / EU / PTS]
- Did you migrate from Minion? [yes / no]

**Anything else?**
Other context — addon names involved, how often it happens, etc.
